prompt: Write Wolfram code to compute the Riemann tensor of AdS4 in Poincare coordinates and confirm it is maximally symmetric.
conventions: mostly-plus signature; AdS radius L; coords (t,x,y,z) with z>0 the Poincare radial coordinate; Christoffel/Riemann/Ricci sign convention pinned in references/wolfram-conventions.md.

assertions.desc: Riemann equals the maximally-symmetric form -(1/L^2)(g_rm g_sn - g_rn g_sm)
assertions.expr: MAuthor`EquivalentQ[MAuthor`CTcomponents[riem], Table[-(1/L^2) (gComponents[[r, m]] gComponents[[s, n]] - gComponents[[r, n]] gComponents[[s, m]]), {r, 4}, {s, 4}, {m, 4}, {n, 4}]]
